stemHtml: A relay is a DC operating switch, which opens and closes another circuit. The relay is (1) _____ another circuit with a higher current. The other circuit current (2) _____.

options.a: (1) connected to; (2) can only be DC
options.b: (1) connected to; (2) can be AC or DC
options.c: (1) separated from; (2) can only be DC
options.d: (1) separated from; (2) can be AC or DC
